item.name: Arrhidaeus Master Key
item.description: A heavy gold key that, when inserted into the proper slot on the Arrhidaeus transport module, will power the superannuated device.

mount.name: Arrhidaeus
mount.action: Arrhidaeus, Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus, Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus. Arrhidaeus, Arrhidaeus. Oh, oh, oh, Arrhidaeus. Summon forth your Arrhidaeus.
mount.description: Fabricated within Alexander's internal manufactories, Arrhidaeus was primarily used to wreak temporal disruption on any and all invaders. This particular construct saw its weapons systems overridden following capture, and now serves as a glorified transport module.
mount.tooltip:
You are implying that
the Illuminati are aware
of this temporal disruption?
- Mide

obj.n: Alexander - The Soul of the Creator (Savage)
